scope: Pass B full-surface expansion against the live published OpenAPI definition (getbrevo/brevo-java swagger_definition_client.yml, 199 paths / 278 method+path operations, fetched 2026-07-04): 9 read streams (contacts, email_campaigns, contacts_lists, senders, senders_domains, contacts_segments, companies, crm_deals, webhooks) and 14 write actions covering contact/list/sender/company/deal/webhook lifecycle mutations. Excluded: the entire Loyalty & Referral add-on product line (balances/tiers/offers/vouchers, ~49 endpoints, requires a loyalty program id this connector does not model), Conversations live-chat messaging, Corporate/reseller multi-account admin, ecommerce catalog/order/coupon/category/product-alert surfaces (no consuming stream reaches CRM-adjacent parity this pass), CRM sub-resources (notes/tasks/files/pipeline-metadata/attribute-schema), SMS/WhatsApp/transactional-email send+template+statistics surfaces (separate channel products, all send actions are irreversible real-world side effects rather than data mutations), inbound-email-parsing events, feeds, payments-requests, and account/organization/corporate admin (user invitations, permissions, sub-account provisioning) as out_of_scope breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass; single-object detail endpoints duplicating an already-covered list stream, binary-payload uploads/downloads (files, campaign images, inbound attachments), destructive bulk-import/export job kickoffs, and non-data endpoints (account snapshot, config toggles, process/job status) round out the exclusion set.

excluded.reason: account identity/plan/credits snapshot, used only by check, not a syncable object stream
ecommerce category catalog list; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage, no consuming stream this pass
creates/updates an ecommerce category; part of the ecommerce surface excluded this pass
bulk ecommerce category upsert; part of the ecommerce surface excluded this pass
single-category detail; same record shape as the excluded categories list
asynchronous bulk company import job kickoff, not a synchronous read/write record operation
bulk link/unlink of contacts and deals against one company; update_company already covers the per-record linkedContactsIds/linkedDealsIds mutation shape this dialect can express
single-company detail; identical record shape to the companies list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
irreversible CRM record deletion gated behind the CRM admin/owner role; not exposed as a write action this pass pending elevated-scope review
contact-attribute schema/metadata list (the account's custom-field definitions), not contact record data itself; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage

updates a custom contact-attribute definition; part of the excluded attribute-schema surface
deletes a custom contact-attribute definition account-wide, wiping that field's stored value for every contact; account-schema mutation, not a record-level operation
deletes one option of a multiple-choice contact attribute account-wide; account-schema mutation, not a record-level operation
bulk multi-contact update in one request; single-record update_contact already covers the per-record mutation shape this dialect can express
triggers a double opt-in confirmation email flow rather than a plain data mutation; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
asynchronous bulk CSV export job kickoff, not a synchronous read/write record operation

updates a folder; part of the excluded folder-container surface
deletes a folder AND every list nested inside it; cascading destructive scope beyond a single record
lists scoped to one folder; same record shape as the unscoped contacts/lists endpoint already covered by no stream this pass, so excluded alongside it for breadth-vs-cost triage
asynchronous bulk contact import job kickoff, not a synchronous read/write record operation
single-list detail; identical record shape to the contacts_lists stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
